name: White Chocolate Mousse Recipe
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Grand Marnier or cherry brandy
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the white chocolate in a double boiler.
2. Whisk vigorously while gradually adding the hot water to obtain a smooth paste.
3. Whisk in the liqueur or flavoring and remove from heat.
4. Whip the cream until it holds soft peaks; fold into the chocolate mixture and stir only until well mixed.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until they are foamy and carefully fold in the chocolate mixture so that it remains fluffy.
6. Chill and serve in individual dishes. If prepared for Valentine's Day, it would look scrumptious served with some red berries.
Note: Prepare the White Chocolate Mousse no more than three or four hours before serving.
